summary: Deterministic and human-auditable proof that scenario normalizer runtime completeness and surface/preset vocabulary are gated.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: scenario normalize helpers and evaluation surface vocabulary
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: The runtime completeness half is deterministic; the copy-reconciliation half is human-auditable through maintainer spec citations.
notClaimed: Every future user-facing copy change is automatically semantically reviewed.
Scenario normalizers are still evaluation surfaces.
The lint gate proves app behavior quality.

commandEvidence.command: npm run lint:specs && npm run lint:scenario-normalizers

decision.reason: Lint gates and maintainer spec citations prove the surviving scenario normalizer runtime completeness and current surface/preset vocabulary boundary.
